read.abares 0.1.0
  • Reference
    • read.abares

Get Estimates by Size From ABARES

get_estimates_by_size.Rd

Get Estimates by Size From ABARES

Usage

get_estimates_by_size()

get_est_by_size()

Value

A data.table::data.table object with the variable field as the key.

Note

Columns are renamed and reordered for consistency.

Examples


get_estimates_by_size()
#> Key: <Variable>
#>                                 Variable  Year  Value   RSE      Industry
#>                                   <char> <int>  <num> <int>        <char>
#>     1: AI stud fees and herd testing ($)  1990  14646    87 All Broadacre
#>     2: AI stud fees and herd testing ($)  1990   4337    74 All Broadacre
#>     3: AI stud fees and herd testing ($)  1990    503    50 All Broadacre
#>     4: AI stud fees and herd testing ($)  1990  49173    95          Beef
#>     5: AI stud fees and herd testing ($)  1990   2724    82          Beef
#>    ---                                                                   
#> 83492:                 Wool receipts ($)  2022 262019    18         Sheep
#> 83493:                 Wool receipts ($)  2022  57572    11         Sheep
#> 83494:                 Wool receipts ($)  2022 407320    54    Sheep-Beef
#> 83495:                 Wool receipts ($)  2022  98513    26    Sheep-Beef
#> 83496:                 Wool receipts ($)  2022  54721    25    Sheep-Beef
#>          Size
#>        <char>
#>     1:  Large
#>     2: Medium
#>     3:  Small
#>     4:  Large
#>     5: Medium
#>    ---       
#> 83492: Medium
#> 83493:  Small
#> 83494:  Large
#> 83495: Medium
#> 83496:  Small

# or shorter
get_est_by_size()
#> Key: <Variable>
#>                                 Variable  Year  Value   RSE      Industry
#>                                   <char> <int>  <num> <int>        <char>
#>     1: AI stud fees and herd testing ($)  1990  14646    87 All Broadacre
#>     2: AI stud fees and herd testing ($)  1990   4337    74 All Broadacre
#>     3: AI stud fees and herd testing ($)  1990    503    50 All Broadacre
#>     4: AI stud fees and herd testing ($)  1990  49173    95          Beef
#>     5: AI stud fees and herd testing ($)  1990   2724    82          Beef
#>    ---                                                                   
#> 83492:                 Wool receipts ($)  2022 262019    18         Sheep
#> 83493:                 Wool receipts ($)  2022  57572    11         Sheep
#> 83494:                 Wool receipts ($)  2022 407320    54    Sheep-Beef
#> 83495:                 Wool receipts ($)  2022  98513    26    Sheep-Beef
#> 83496:                 Wool receipts ($)  2022  54721    25    Sheep-Beef
#>          Size
#>        <char>
#>     1:  Large
#>     2: Medium
#>     3:  Small
#>     4:  Large
#>     5: Medium
#>    ---       
#> 83492: Medium
#> 83493:  Small
#> 83494:  Large
#> 83495: Medium
#> 83496:  Small
